name: smoothmyvideo
description: Desktop GUI for AI video frame interpolation (GMFSS), Python engine under the hood
author: Florin Nutiu

scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('package-lock.json', { force: true }); fs.rmSync('engine/bin', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm install && node scripts/fetch-ffmpeg.js && npm start
scripts.dist: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('release', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc && electron-builder
